Lead: Longmont City Council Meeting Rescheduled: The originally scheduled Tuesday, June 30 City Council meeting was canceled and rescheduled for July 1 at 7 pm. Editor context: This change in the council meeting schedule may affect public participation and agenda items. Suggested treatment: brief. Newsworthiness: 14/20 (immediacy 5, impact 3, conflict 2, novelty 4). Why now: The city council meeting was canceled and rescheduled for July 1 at 7 pm. Suggested next step: Check the City Council agenda for any changes or new items added due to the rescheduling. What would make this publishable: A detailed agenda of the new City Council meeting, any changes in agenda items, or public feedback on the rescheduling.

Brief
Ready to draft
Novelty 4/5

Use linked evidence and the novelty notes to decide whether this is ready for reader-facing copy.
